research_series.series_name: Muscle and Functional Mobility Variation Tree

core_interpretation: Muscle/function tree should prioritize strength and functional mobility over muscle mass alone.
guardrails: Do not infer muscle loss from low activity alone.
Do not infer weakness from fatigue report alone.
Do not infer countermeasure failure without adherence/load data.
Do not infer sarcopenia from one strength test without mass/function context.
Do not compare strength metrics without protocol and body-size normalization.
research_gaps: Few studies directly compare countermeasure nonresponse vs nonadherence vs insufficient load.
Sparse longitudinal data on postflight recovery trajectories after unloading.
